{{Quote|Without the protection of the ''sacred jewels,'' our valley and this whole planet will soon be reduced to cosmic rubble like the ''rest'' of the Red Nebula!|[[Unidentified priest (Red Nebula)|Red Nebula priest]], to [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]|<ref name="SW50" />}}
The '''Planet of the Red Nebula''' was the sole inhabited [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Red Nebula/Legends|Red Nebula]], located in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]]. It was bombarded with [[Comet/Legends|comets]] when the [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] was severed from the rest of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] by an [[Awesome cataclysm|unknown cataclysm]].<ref name="SW50" />

{{Planet-stub}}
